meaning: To successfully reach a target you aimed for
definition: To successfully reach a target you aimed for
example: With hard work, he achieved every goal he set.
exampleHindi: कड़ी मेहनत से उन्होंने अपना हर लक्ष्य हासिल किया।

meaning: To formally request to be considered for a position
definition: To formally request to be considered for a position
example: He applied for a job at the leading tech company.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने प्रमुख टेक कंपनी में नौकरी के लिए आवेदन किया।

meaning: A fact that is unpleasant or painful to accept
definition: A fact that is unpleasant or painful to accept
example: The bitter truth is that not everyone will succeed.
exampleHindi: कड़वी सच्चाई यह है कि हर कोई सफल नहीं होगा।

meaning: अत्यधिक और असुविधाजनक ठंड.
definition: Extremely and uncomfortably cold.
example: It is bitterly cold outside, so wear a scarf.
exampleHindi: बाहर कड़ाके की ठंड है, इसलिए स्कार्फ पहनें।

meaning: Very unhappy or let down about something
definition: Very unhappy or let down about something
example: He was bitterly disappointed when he didn't get the role.
exampleHindi: जब उन्हें यह भूमिका नहीं मिली तो वह बुरी तरह निराश हो गये।

meaning: An area where someone lacks understanding or awareness
definition: An area where someone lacks understanding or awareness
example: Overconfidence is a common blind spot in leadership.
exampleHindi: नेतृत्व में अति आत्मविश्वास एक सामान्य अंध स्थान है।

meaning: A daring or confident action that involves risk
definition: A daring or confident action that involves risk
example: Launching the product during a recession was a bold move.
exampleHindi: मंदी के दौरान उत्पाद लॉन्च करना एक साहसिक कदम था।

meaning: To stop doing something you do regularly
definition: To stop doing something that is a regular pattern.
example: Breaking a bad habit requires real discipline.
exampleHindi: किसी बुरी आदत को तोड़ने के लिए वास्तविक अनुशासन की आवश्यकता होती है।

meaning: To surpass the previously best recorded achievement
definition: To surpass the previously best recorded achievement
example: She broke the record for fastest completion of the course.
exampleHindi: उसने कोर्स सबसे तेजी से पूरा करने का रिकॉर्ड तोड़ दिया।

meaning: A clever or creative thought or suggestion
definition: A clever or creative thought or suggestion
example: It was a bright idea to hold the meeting online.
exampleHindi: बैठक को ऑनलाइन आयोजित करना एक उज्ज्वल विचार था।

meaning: To develop how others perceive your quality or character over time
definition: To develop how others perceive your quality or character over time
example: She has spent years building a reputation for honesty.
exampleHindi: उसने ईमानदारी की प्रतिष्ठा बनाने में वर्षों बिताए हैं।

meaning: To permanently damage a relationship or opportunity
definition: [object Object]
example: Don't burn bridges with former colleagues; you may need them later.
exampleHindi: पूर्व सहकर्मियों के साथ संबंध खराब न करें; आपको बाद में उनकी आवश्यकता हो सकती है.

meaning: To stop working for the rest of the day
definition: [object Object]
example: We've done enough for now â€” let's call it a day.
exampleHindi: हमने अभी काफी कुछ किया है - चलो इसे एक दिन कहते हैं।

meaning: To execute or implement a strategy or scheme
definition: To execute or implement a strategy or scheme
example: The team carried out the plan flawlessly.
exampleHindi: टीम ने योजना को बिना किसी त्रुटि के पूरा किया।

meaning: To become ill with a cold virus
definition: To become ill with a cold.
example: She caught a cold after standing in the rain.
exampleHindi: बारिश में खड़े होने के बाद उसे सर्दी लग गई।

meaning: To alter your opinion or decision
definition: To alter your opinion or decision
example: She changed her mind about studying abroad.
exampleHindi: उसने विदेश में पढ़ाई के बारे में अपना मन बदल लिया।

meaning: A very good friend with whom you share a deep bond
definition: A very good friend with whom you share a deep bond
example: He is my closest friend â€” I trust him completely.
exampleHindi: वह मेरा सबसे करीबी दोस्त है - मुझे उस पर पूरा भरोसा है।

meaning: To finally reach a decision or judgment
definition: To finally reach a decision or judgment
example: After reviewing the evidence, we came to a conclusion.
exampleHindi: सबूतों की समीक्षा करने के बाद, हम एक निष्कर्ष पर पहुंचे।

meaning: To accept or become comfortable with a difficult situation
definition: To accept or become comfortable with a difficult situation
example: It took years to come to terms with losing his sight.
exampleHindi: अपनी दृष्टि खोने की स्थिति से उबरने में कई साल लग गए।

meaning: Practical, everyday wisdom that most people have
definition: Practical, everyday wisdom that most people have
example: You don't need a manual â€” just use common sense.
exampleHindi: आपको किसी मैनुअल की आवश्यकता नहीं है - बस सामान्य ज्ञान का उपयोग करें।

meaning: बेहोशी की भारी और आरामदायक स्थिति।
definition: A heavy and restful state of unconsciousness.
example: He was in such a deep sleep that he didn't hear the alarm.
exampleHindi: वह इतनी गहरी नींद में था कि उसे अलार्म सुनाई नहीं दिया.

meaning: Very worried or troubled about something
definition: Very worried about something.
example: Officials are deeply concerned about the rising crime rates.
exampleHindi: बढ़ती अपराध दर को लेकर अधिकारी काफी चिंतित हैं।

meaning: Strongly established over a long time; hard to change
definition: Strongly established over a long time; hard to change
example: Their traditions are deeply rooted in ancient culture.
exampleHindi: उनकी परंपराएँ प्राचीन संस्कृति में गहराई से निहित हैं।

meaning: To do a helpful or kind act for someone
definition: To do a helpful or kind act for someone
example: Could you do me a favour and mail this letter?
exampleHindi: क्या आप मुझ पर एक उपकार कर सकते हैं और यह पत्र मुझे भेज सकते हैं?

meaning: To complete assigned school work at home
definition: To complete school assignments given to be done at home.
example: She always does her homework before dinner.
exampleHindi: वह हमेशा रात के खाने से पहले अपना होमवर्क करती है।

meaning: To investigate and study a topic systematically
definition: To investigate and study a topic systematically
example: Scientists spend years doing research before publishing results.
exampleHindi: परिणाम प्रकाशित करने से पहले वैज्ञानिक अनुसंधान करने में वर्षों बिताते हैं।

meaning: To perform successfully or to be in good health
definition: To perform successfully or to be in good health
example: She did well in all her exams this semester.
exampleHindi: उसने इस सेमेस्टर की सभी परीक्षाओं में अच्छा प्रदर्शन किया।

meaning: To form an opinion or judgment based on evidence
definition: To form an opinion or judgment based on evidence
example: From the data, we can draw a clear conclusion.
exampleHindi: आंकड़ों से हम स्पष्ट निष्कर्ष निकाल सकते हैं।

meaning: To cause people to notice something or someone
definition: To cause people to notice something or someone
example: The bright colours drew attention to the display.
exampleHindi: चमकीले रंगों ने डिस्प्ले की ओर ध्यान खींचा।

meaning: To deal with something difficult
definition: To deal with something difficult
example: Every entrepreneur faces challenges when starting out.
exampleHindi: प्रत्येक उद्यमी को शुरुआत करते समय चुनौतियों का सामना करना पड़ता है।

meaning: To not achieve the required score in an assessment
definition: To not achieve the required score in an assessment
example: He failed the exam and had to retake it.
exampleHindi: वह परीक्षा में असफल हो गया और उसे दोबारा परीक्षा देनी पड़ी।

meaning: An equal or reasonable portion of something
definition: An equal or reasonable portion of something
example: Everyone must do their fair share of the work.
exampleHindi: हर किसी को काम में अपना उचित हिस्सा देना चाहिए।

meaning: Food that is quickly prepared and served in restaurants
definition: Food that is quickly prepared and served in restaurants
example: Eating too much fast food is unhealthy.
exampleHindi: ज्यादा फास्ट फूड खाना स्वास्थ्य के लिए हानिकारक होता है।

meaning: To have a firm, passionate opinion about something
definition: To have a firm, passionate opinion about something
example: I feel strongly that everyone deserves equal opportunities.
exampleHindi: मैं दृढ़ता से महसूस करता हूं कि हर कोई समान अवसर का हकदार है।

meaning: To obtain employment
definition: To obtain employment
example: It took her three months to find a job after graduation.
exampleHindi: ग्रेजुएशन के बाद नौकरी ढूंढने में उन्हें तीन महीने लग गए।

meaning: To start doing something so regularly it becomes automatic
definition: To start doing something so regularly it becomes automatic
example: Reading every morning is a great habit to form.
exampleHindi: हर सुबह पढ़ना एक अच्छी आदत है।

meaning: Time when you are not working or studying; leisure time
definition: Time when you are not working or studying; leisure time
example: I like to read in my free time.
exampleHindi: मुझे अपने खाली समय में पढ़ना पसंद है।

meaning: Completely knowing or understanding something
definition: Completely knowing or understanding something
example: She was fully aware of the risks before proceeding.
exampleHindi: आगे बढ़ने से पहले वह जोखिमों से पूरी तरह अवगत थी।

meaning: To acquire practical knowledge through doing something
definition: To acquire practical knowledge through doing something
example: Internships help students gain valuable work experience.
exampleHindi: इंटर्नशिप छात्रों को मूल्यवान कार्य अनुभव प्राप्त करने में मदद करती है।

meaning: To become heavier; to increase body mass
definition: To become heavier; to increase body mass
example: Many people tend to gain weight during winter.
exampleHindi: सर्दी के मौसम में कई लोगों का वजन बढ़ने लगता है।

meaning: To be moved to a higher position at work
definition: To be moved to a higher position at work
example: She worked hard and finally got a promotion.
exampleHindi: उसने कड़ी मेहनत की और आखिरकार उसे प्रमोशन मिल गया।

meaning: To remove or eliminate something you no longer want
definition: To remove or eliminate something you no longer want
example: It's time to get rid of all these old clothes.
exampleHindi: इन सभी पुराने कपड़ों से छुटकारा पाने का समय आ गया है।

meaning: To learn how to do something through practice
definition: To learn how to do something through practice
example: Once you get the hang of it, it becomes much easier.
exampleHindi: एक बार जब आप इसे समझ जाते हैं, तो यह बहुत आसान हो जाता है।

meaning: To formally show or explain something to a group
definition: To speak to an audience to explain an idea.
example: She gave a compelling presentation to the investors.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने निवेशकों के सामने एक आकर्षक प्रस्तुति दी।

meaning: To formally speak to a group of people
definition: To formally speak to a group of people
example: The president gave a powerful speech at the ceremony.
exampleHindi: समारोह में राष्ट्रपति ने जोरदार भाषण दिया.

meaning: To tell someone your opinion about what they should do
definition: To offer an opinion about what someone should do.
example: My mentor always gives me excellent advice.
exampleHindi: मेरे गुरु मुझे हमेशा बेहतरीन सलाह देते हैं।

meaning: An extremely good or rare chance to do something
definition: An extremely good or rare chance to do something
example: This scholarship is a golden opportunity for your future.
exampleHindi: यह स्कॉलरशिप आपके भविष्य के लिए एक सुनहरा अवसर है।

meaning: A large amount or quantity of something
definition: A large amount or quantity of something
example: There is a great deal of work left to be done.
exampleHindi: अभी बहुत सारा काम किया जाना बाकी है।

meaning: Great effort and diligence put into a task
definition: Great effort and diligence put into a task
example: Success is the result of hard work and persistence.
exampleHindi: सफलता कड़ी मेहनत और दृढ़ता का परिणाम है।

meaning: To talk with someone; to engage in discussion
definition: To talk with someone; to engage in discussion
example: We need to have a conversation about your performance.
exampleHindi: हमें आपके प्रदर्शन के बारे में बातचीत करने की ज़रूरत है.

meaning: To share the same interests, qualities, or features
definition: To share the same interests, qualities, or features
example: Despite their differences, they have a lot in common.
exampleHindi: अपने मतभेदों के बावजूद, उनमें बहुत कुछ समानता है।

meaning: To begin to doubt a decision you have already made
definition: To begin to doubt a decision you have already made
example: She had second thoughts about quitting her job.
exampleHindi: उसके मन में नौकरी छोड़ने के बारे में दोबारा विचार आया।

meaning: Very intense rainfall
definition: A large amount of falling rain.
example: The match was cancelled due to heavy rain.
exampleHindi: भारी बारिश के कारण मैच रद्द कर दिया गया.

meaning: A large amount of vehicles on the road, causing delays
definition: A large amount of vehicles on the road, causing delays
example: We were stuck in heavy traffic on the motorway.
exampleHindi: हम मोटरवे पर भारी ट्रैफिक में फंस गए थे।

meaning: Strongly suggested by others as being very good
definition: Strongly suggested by others as being very good
example: This restaurant is highly recommended by food critics.
exampleHindi: खाद्य समीक्षकों द्वारा इस रेस्तरां की अत्यधिक अनुशंसा की जाती है।

meaning: बहुत बड़ी मात्रा में सफलता प्राप्त करना।
definition: Achieving a very large amount of success.
example: The new marketing campaign was highly successful.
exampleHindi: नया विपणन अभियान अत्यधिक सफल रहा।

meaning: To reach a point where you cannot make further progress
definition: To reach a point where you cannot make further progress
example: After weeks of study, I felt like I had hit a wall.
exampleHindi: हफ्तों के अध्ययन के बाद, मुझे ऐसा लगा जैसे मैं किसी दीवार से टकरा गया हूँ।

meaning: To have a formal gathering to discuss topics
definition: To have a formal gathering to discuss topics
example: The company holds a weekly meeting every Monday.
exampleHindi: कंपनी प्रत्येक सोमवार को साप्ताहिक बैठक आयोजित करती है।

meaning: To wait in suspense; or literally to stop breathing temporarily
definition: To wait in suspense; or literally to stop breathing temporarily
example: Everyone held their breath as the winner was announced.
exampleHindi: विजेता की घोषणा होते ही सभी की सांसें अटक गईं।

meaning: To do what you said you would do
definition: To do what one said they would do.
example: He always keeps his promises, no matter what.
exampleHindi: वह हमेशा अपने वादे निभाते हैं, चाहे कुछ भी हो।

meaning: To not tell others about private information
definition: To not tell anyone about something that is meant to be hidden.
example: Can I trust you to keep a secret?
exampleHindi: क्या मैं राज़ रखने के लिए आप पर भरोसा कर सकता हूँ?

meaning: To maintain regular communication with someone
definition: To maintain contact with someone.
example: Let's keep in touch after you move away.
exampleHindi: आपके दूर जाने के बाद भी हम संपर्क में रहेंगे।

meaning: An important or central function in something
definition: An important or central function in something
example: She played a key role in the success of the project.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने परियोजना की सफलता में महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका निभाई।

meaning: To begin an organized effort to achieve a goal
definition: To begin an organized effort to achieve a goal
example: The charity launched a nationwide awareness campaign.
exampleHindi: चैरिटी ने राष्ट्रव्यापी जागरूकता अभियान चलाया।

meaning: To no longer be employed; to be let go
definition: To no longer be employed; to be let go
example: He lost his job during the economic downturn.
exampleHindi: आर्थिक मंदी के दौरान उन्होंने अपनी नौकरी खो दी।

meaning: To no longer believe a good outcome is possible
definition: To no longer believe a good outcome is possible
example: Even after many setbacks, he refused to lose hope.
exampleHindi: कई असफलताओं के बाद भी उन्होंने उम्मीद खोने से इनकार कर दिया।

meaning: To stop being able to wait calmly; to become frustrated
definition: To stop being able to wait calmly; to become frustrated
example: She finally lost patience with the slow service.
exampleHindi: धीमी सेवा से आखिरकार उसने धैर्य खो दिया।

meaning: To stop communicating with someone over time
definition: To stop communicating with someone over time
example: We lost touch after graduating from college.
exampleHindi: कॉलेज से स्नातक होने के बाद हमारा संपर्क टूट गया।

meaning: To forget about time passing while doing something
definition: To forget about time passing while doing something
example: I was so absorbed in the book that I lost track of time.
exampleHindi: मैं किताब में इतना खो गया था कि मुझे समय का पता ही नहीं चला।

meaning: To become lighter; to reduce body mass
definition: To become lighter; to reduce body mass
example: He followed a strict diet to lose weight.
exampleHindi: वजन कम करने के लिए उन्होंने सख्त डाइट फॉलो की।

meaning: To select one option from among several
definition: To select one option from among several
example: You need to make a choice between the two offers.
exampleHindi: आपको दोनों ऑफ़र के बीच चयन करना होगा।

meaning: To formally express dissatisfaction about something
definition: To formally express dissatisfaction about something
example: She made a complaint about the poor customer service.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने खराब ग्राहक सेवा के बारे में शिकायत की।

meaning: To choose between options; to decide on a course of action
definition: To officially decide on something after considering options.
example: It was difficult to make a decision without all the facts.
exampleHindi: सभी तथ्यों के बिना निर्णय लेना कठिन था।

meaning: To earn enough money to support yourself
definition: To earn enough money to support yourself
example: He makes a living as a freelance photographer.
exampleHindi: वह एक फ्रीलांस फोटोग्राफर के रूप में जीविकोपार्जन करता है।

meaning: To do something incorrectly or in error
definition: To do something wrong.
example: Everyone makes a mistake from time to time.
exampleHindi: हर कोई समय-समय पर गलती करता है।

meaning: To express an opinion or fact clearly in discussion
definition: To express an opinion or fact clearly in discussion
example: She made a valid point during the debate.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने बहस के दौरान एक वैध मुद्दा उठाया।

meaning: To book a table, room, or seat in advance
definition: To book a table, room, or seat in advance
example: I made a reservation at a restaurant for our anniversary.
exampleHindi: मैंने हमारी सालगिरह के लिए एक रेस्तरां में आरक्षण कराया।

meaning: To propose an idea for others to consider
definition: To propose an idea for others to consider
example: Can I make a suggestion about how to improve the process?
exampleHindi: क्या मैं इस बारे में कोई सुझाव दे सकता हूं कि इस प्रक्रिया को कैसे बेहतर बनाया जाए?

meaning: To arrange a specific time to meet someone, especially officially
definition: To arrange a specific time to meet someone, especially officially
example: I need to make an appointment with the doctor.
exampleHindi: मुझे डॉक्टर से अपॉइंटमेंट लेना है.

meaning: To try hard to do something
definition: To try hard to do something.
example: Please make an effort to arrive on time.
exampleHindi: कृपया समय पर पहुंचने का प्रयास करें।

meaning: To create a strong, lasting effect on someone
definition: To create a strong, lasting effect on someone
example: He made a great impression at the interview.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने साक्षात्कार में बहुत अच्छा प्रभाव डाला।

meaning: To form new friendships with people
definition: To form new friendships with people
example: It's easy to make friends when you're open and friendly.
exampleHindi: जब आप खुले और मैत्रीपूर्ण हों तो मित्र बनाना आसान होता है।

meaning: To advance or improve over time
definition: To move forward or improve.
example: The patient is making great progress in recovery.
exampleHindi: मरीज़ की रिकवरी में काफ़ी प्रगति हो रही है।

meaning: To be logical, clear, or understandable
definition: To be logical, clear, or understandable
example: Your explanation finally makes sense to me.
exampleHindi: आपका स्पष्टीकरण अंततः मुझे समझ में आया।

meaning: To decide firmly on something
definition: To decide firmly on something
example: Please make up your mind before the offer expires.
exampleHindi: कृपया ऑफ़र समाप्त होने से पहले अपना मन बना लें।

meaning: To finish something by the required time
definition: To finish something by the required time
example: The team worked overtime to meet the project deadline.
exampleHindi: परियोजना की समय सीमा को पूरा करने के लिए टीम ने ओवरटाइम काम किया।

meaning: To fail to finish something by the required date
definition: To fail to finish something by the required date
example: Missing a deadline can have serious consequences at work.
exampleHindi: समय सीमा चूकने से कार्यस्थल पर गंभीर परिणाम हो सकते हैं।

meaning: To fail to take advantage of a chance
definition: To fail to take advantage of a chance
example: Don't miss this opportunity to grow your skills.
exampleHindi: अपने कौशल को विकसित करने का यह अवसर न चूकें।

meaning: A situation where you barely avoided danger
definition: A situation where you barely avoided danger
example: It was a narrow escape when the car brakes failed.
exampleHindi: कार के ब्रेक फेल हो जाने से वह बाल-बाल बच गया।

meaning: To successfully complete an exam with a satisfactory grade
definition: To successfully complete an exam with a satisfactory grade
example: She studied hard and passed all her exams.
exampleHindi: उसने कड़ी मेहनत से पढ़ाई की और अपनी सभी परीक्षाएं उत्तीर्ण कीं।

meaning: To go and see someone or a place
definition: To go to see someone or somewhere.
example: We paid a visit to our grandparents last weekend.
exampleHindi: हमने पिछले सप्ताहांत अपने दादा-दादी से मुलाकात की।

meaning: To carefully watch, listen, or concentrate on something
definition: To focus on or listen carefully to someone or something.
example: Please pay attention when the teacher is speaking.
exampleHindi: जब शिक्षक बोल रहे हों तो कृपया ध्यान दें।

meaning: To carefully notice and be precise about small things
definition: To carefully notice and be precise about small things
example: This job requires you to pay attention to detail.
exampleHindi: इस कार्य के लिए आपको विवरण पर ध्यान देने की आवश्यकता है।

meaning: To settle a financial charge or invoice
definition: To give money for a service or meal received.
example: He insisted on paying the bill at dinner.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने रात्रिभोज के समय बिल का भुगतान करने पर जोर दिया।

meaning: Completely easy to understand; totally obvious
definition: Completely easy to understand; totally obvious
example: Please make sure your instructions are perfectly clear.
exampleHindi: कृपया सुनिश्चित करें कि आपके निर्देश बिल्कुल स्पष्ट हैं।

meaning: To formally request goods or food
definition: To formally request goods or food
example: He placed an order for new office supplies.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने नई कार्यालय आपूर्ति के लिए ऑर्डर दिया।

meaning: To use one's influence or connections to get something done
definition: To use one's influence or connections to get something done
example: He had to pull strings to get tickets to the sold-out show.
exampleHindi: बिक चुके शो के टिकट पाने के लिए उन्हें कड़ी मेहनत करनी पड़ी।

meaning: To invest time and energy into doing something
definition: To invest time and energy into doing something
example: If you put in the effort, the results will follow.
exampleHindi: यदि आप प्रयास करेंगे तो परिणाम अवश्य मिलेंगे।

meaning: To bring up a topic or issue for discussion
definition: To bring up a topic or issue for discussion
example: The report raises several important questions.
exampleHindi: रिपोर्ट कई अहम सवाल उठाती है.

meaning: To help people know about an important issue
definition: To help people know about an important issue
example: The campaign aims to raise awareness about climate change.
exampleHindi: अभियान का उद्देश्य जलवायु परिवर्तन के बारे में जागरूकता बढ़ाना है।

meaning: To cause surprise or mild disapproval in others
definition: To cause surprise or mild disapproval in others
example: His unusual decision raised a few eyebrows at the office.
exampleHindi: उनके असामान्य निर्णय से कार्यालय में कुछ लोगों की भौंहें तन गईं।

meaning: To come to a mutual understanding or deal
definition: To come to a mutual understanding or deal
example: After hours of debate, they finally reached an agreement.
exampleHindi: घंटों की बहस के बाद आखिरकार वे एक समझौते पर पहुंचे।

meaning: To manage and operate a company
definition: To manage and operate a company
example: Running a business requires dedication and strong leadership.
exampleHindi: व्यवसाय चलाने के लिए समर्पण और मजबूत नेतृत्व की आवश्यकता होती है।

meaning: To have no more time left to do something
definition: To have no more time left to do something
example: We ran out of time before finishing the exam.
exampleHindi: परीक्षा ख़त्म करने से पहले हमारे पास समय ख़त्म हो गया।

meaning: To expose yourself to danger or a bad outcome
definition: To expose yourself to danger or a bad outcome
example: If you don't prepare, you run the risk of failing.
exampleHindi: यदि आप तैयारी नहीं करते हैं, तो आप असफल होने का जोखिम उठाते हैं।

meaning: To use less time on something; to be more efficient
definition: To do something in a way that requires less time.
example: Taking the highway will save us a lot of time.
exampleHindi: राजमार्ग लेने से हमारा काफी समय बचेगा।

meaning: To ask someone for their guidance or recommendation
definition: To ask someone for their guidance or recommendation
example: I always seek advice before making big decisions.
exampleHindi: मैं बड़े निर्णय लेने से पहले हमेशा सलाह लेता हूं।

meaning: To think carefully and thoroughly about something important
definition: To think carefully and thoroughly about something important
example: You should seriously consider all your options.
exampleHindi: आपको अपने सभी विकल्पों पर गंभीरता से विचार करना चाहिए।

meaning: To establish an objective or target to work toward
definition: To establish an objective or target to work toward
example: She set a goal to run a marathon by the end of the year.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने साल के अंत तक मैराथन दौड़ने का लक्ष्य रखा।

meaning: To achieve the best result ever recorded in something
definition: To achieve the best result ever recorded in something
example: The athlete set a new world record in the 100m sprint.
exampleHindi: एथलीट ने 100 मीटर स्प्रिंट में एक नया विश्व रिकॉर्ड बनाया।

meaning: A sudden, significant rise in something
definition: A sudden, significant rise in something
example: There was a sharp increase in unemployment last quarter.
exampleHindi: पिछली तिमाही में बेरोज़गारी में तेज़ बढ़ोतरी हुई थी.

meaning: To make something easier to understand; to clarify
definition: To make something easier to understand; to clarify
example: The investigation shed light on the cause of the accident.
exampleHindi: जांच से दुर्घटना के कारण पर प्रकाश पड़ा।

meaning: A small, gradual positive change
definition: A small, gradual positive change
example: There has been a slight improvement in his condition.
exampleHindi: उनकी हालत में थोड़ा सुधार हुआ है.

meaning: To find a solution or answer to a difficulty
definition: To find a solution or answer to a difficulty
example: Engineers work together to solve complex problems.
exampleHindi: जटिल समस्याओं को हल करने के लिए इंजीनियर मिलकर काम करते हैं।

meaning: To use time doing a particular activity
definition: To use time doing a particular activity
example: I love spending time with my family on weekends.
exampleHindi: मुझे सप्ताहांत पर अपने परिवार के साथ समय बिताना पसंद है।

meaning: To begin having children; to establish a household
definition: To begin having children; to establish a household
example: They got married and decided to start a family.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने शादी कर ली और परिवार शुरू करने का फैसला किया।

meaning: किसी भी परिस्थिति में अनुमति नहीं है.
definition: Not allowed under any circumstances.
example: Smoking is strictly forbidden on the premises.
exampleHindi: परिसर में धूम्रपान सख्त वर्जित है।

meaning: To come to an agreement, especially in business
definition: To come to an agreement, especially in business
example: The two companies struck a deal after long negotiations.
exampleHindi: लंबी बातचीत के बाद दोनों कंपनियों ने एक समझौता किया।

meaning: Coffee with a high concentration of caffeine and robust flavour
definition: Coffee with a high concentration of caffeine and robust flavour
example: I need a strong coffee to wake up in the morning.
exampleHindi: सुबह उठने के लिए मुझे एक स्ट्रॉन्ग कॉफ़ी चाहिए।

meaning: A firm and clear viewpoint not easily changed
definition: A firm and clear viewpoint not easily changed
example: She has a strong opinion about environmental policy.
exampleHindi: पर्यावरण नीति के बारे में उनकी मजबूत राय है।

meaning: वायु की तीव्र गति वाली धारा।
definition: A fast-moving current of air.
example: A strong wind blew the roof off the shed.
exampleHindi: तेज़ हवा ने शेड की छत उड़ा दी।

meaning: To have a firm and confident conviction about something
definition: To have a firm and confident conviction about something
example: I strongly believe that education is the key to success.
exampleHindi: मेरा दृढ़ विश्वास है कि शिक्षा सफलता की कुंजी है।

meaning: To hand in or send a formal written document
definition: To hand in or send a formal written document
example: She submitted her report before the deadline.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने समयसीमा से पहले ही अपनी रिपोर्ट सौंप दी.

meaning: To stop working for a short time to rest
definition: To stop working or doing something for a short period to rest.
example: Let's take a break and grab some coffee.
exampleHindi: आइए एक ब्रेक लें और कुछ कॉफ़ी लें।

meaning: To try something even though it might not succeed
definition: To try something even though it might not succeed
example: He decided to take a chance and ask for a promotion.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने एक मौका लेने और पदोन्नति मांगने का फैसला किया।

meaning: To attempt to estimate or predict without certainty
definition: To attempt to estimate or predict without certainty
example: Take a guess at how many people attended the event.
exampleHindi: अंदाजा लगाइए कि इस कार्यक्रम में कितने लोग शामिल हुए थे।

meaning: To look at something briefly or casually
definition: To look at something briefly or casually
example: Can you take a look at this document for me?
exampleHindi: क्या आप मेरे लिए इस दस्तावेज़ पर एक नज़र डाल सकते हैं?

meaning: To sleep for a short time during the day
definition: To sleep for a short time during the day
example: I always take a nap after lunch to recharge.
exampleHindi: मैं हमेशा दोपहर के भोजन के बाद तरोताजा होने के लिए झपकी लेता हूं।

meaning: To do something that might be dangerous or have a bad outcome
definition: To do something that might be dangerous or have a bad outcome
example: She decided to take a risk and start her own business.
exampleHindi: उसने जोखिम लेने और अपना खुद का व्यवसाय शुरू करने का फैसला किया।

meaning: To sit down
definition: To sit down.
example: Please take a seat; the doctor will be with you shortly.
exampleHindi: एक सीट ले कृपया; डॉक्टर शीघ्र ही आपके साथ होंगे।

meaning: To express a clear opinion or position on an issue
definition: To express a clear opinion or position on an issue
example: She took a stand against workplace discrimination.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने कार्यस्थल पर भेदभाव के ख़िलाफ़ स्टैंड लिया।

meaning: To make a move or action toward a goal
definition: To make a move or action toward a goal
example: Taking the first step is always the hardest.
exampleHindi: पहला कदम उठाना हमेशा सबसे कठिन होता है।

meaning: To attempt or sit an exam or assessment
definition: To attempt or sit an exam or assessment
example: Students take a test at the end of each unit.
exampleHindi: छात्र प्रत्येक इकाई के अंत में एक परीक्षा देते हैं।

meaning: To do something in response to a situation
definition: To do something in response to a situation
example: It's time to stop talking and take action.
exampleHindi: अब बात करना बंद करने और कार्रवाई करने का समय आ गया है।

meaning: To make good use of an opportunity
definition: To make good use of an opportunity
example: Take advantage of the sale while it lasts.
exampleHindi: सेल चलने तक इसका लाभ उठाएं।

meaning: To look after or be responsible for someone or something
definition: To look after or be responsible for someone or something
example: She took care of her elderly parents devotedly.
exampleHindi: वह अपने बुजुर्ग माता-पिता की निष्ठापूर्वक देखभाल करती थी।

meaning: To accept that you are in charge of or to blame for something
definition: To accept the blame for something.
example: A good leader takes responsibility for the team's failures.
exampleHindi: एक अच्छा नेता टीम की विफलताओं की जिम्मेदारी लेता है।

meaning: To be first or in charge; to guide others
definition: To be first or in charge; to guide others
example: She decided to take the lead on the new project.
exampleHindi: उसने नई परियोजना का नेतृत्व करने का निर्णय लिया।

meaning: To say something false; to be dishonest
definition: To say something false; to be dishonest
example: He was caught telling a lie about his whereabouts.
exampleHindi: वह अपने ठिकाने के बारे में झूठ बोलते हुए पकड़ा गया।

meaning: To say what is real or honest; not to lie
definition: To say what is real or honest; not to lie
example: It's always better to tell the truth.
exampleHindi: सच बोलना हमेशा बेहतर होता है.

meaning: An important piece of knowledge gained from experience
definition: An important piece of knowledge gained from experience
example: Failure often teaches you the most valuable lessons.
exampleHindi: असफलता अक्सर आपको सबसे मूल्यवान सबक सिखाती है।

meaning: Extremely necessary or critically essential
definition: Extremely necessary or critically essential
example: This decision is of vital importance to our future.
exampleHindi: यह निर्णय हमारे भविष्य के लिए अत्यंत महत्वपूर्ण है।

meaning: To use time inefficiently or on unimportant things
definition: To use time inefficiently or on unimportant things
example: Stop wasting time on social media and focus on your work.
exampleHindi: सोशल मीडिया पर समय बर्बाद करना बंद करें और अपने काम पर ध्यान दें।

meaning: To receive a prize for excellence or achievement
definition: To receive a prize for excellence or achievement
example: The film won several awards at the festival.
exampleHindi: फिल्म ने महोत्सव में कई पुरस्कार जीते।
